slides.headline: You didn't train as a coach to write captions.
Where the week actually goes
body: It quietly adds up to a day a week.

slides.headline: The hidden cost
body: Every admin hour is an hour you're not coaching, selling, or resting.
So you feel busy and behind at the same time.

slides.headline: The fix isn't a longer day
body: You need the repeatable work off your plate.
That's a system job, not a you job.

slides.headline: Hand the repeatable parts to AI
body: Set Claude up once with your offer and tone.
Captions, replies, repurposing — drafted in minutes.
Still in your voice. You just edit.

slides.headline: Get the admin off your plate.
slides.subtext: The starter prompts are in the AI Admin guide.
